# Branch Execution Checklist

Use this file to run any branch in a controlled, beginner-friendly way.

---

## Branch Metadata

- Branch name:
- Purpose:
- Owner:
- Start date:
- Target merge date:

## 1) Pre-Execution

- [ ] I can explain the branch goal in 1–2 sentences
- [ ] Scope is defined (in-scope vs out-of-scope)
- [ ] Risks and assumptions documented
- [ ] Rollback plan documented

## 2) Environment Prep

- [ ] Virtual environment created/activated
- [ ] Dependencies installed from `requirements.txt`
- [ ] Baseline app run confirmed before edits

## 3) Build Steps

- [ ] Step 1 complete
- [ ] Step 2 complete
- [ ] Step 3 complete
- [ ] Intermediate validation complete

## 4) Test & QC

- [ ] Happy-path test passed
- [ ] Failure-path test passed
- [ ] Output/export validation passed
- [ ] `docs/templates/QC_CHECKLIST_TEMPLATE.md` completed

## 5) Documentation & Handoff

- [ ] Updated user-facing docs
- [ ] Added run instructions for beginners
- [ ] Added known limitations
- [ ] Added “next recommended branch”

## 6) GitHub Readiness

- [ ] Commit messages are clear
- [ ] PR summary explains what changed and why
- [ ] Reviewer test steps provided
